description: Credit-aware Sumble v6 sales-intelligence CLI: technographics, people, jobs, with cost estimates, balance tracking, and a local cache so you never pay twice.

tools.name: contact-lists_add
tools.description: Add people to a saved contact list by id (free). Required: list_id. Optional: person_ids. Returns the new ListAddResult.

tools.name: contact-lists_create
tools.description: Create a new contact list (free). Required: name. Returns the new ContactListSummary.

tools.name: contact-lists_get
tools.description: Get the people in a saved contact list (1 credit per person returned). Required: list_id. Returns array of Person.

tools.name: contact-lists_list
tools.description: List your saved contact lists (1 credit per list returned). Returns array of ContactListSummary.

tools.name: organization-lists_add
tools.description: Add organizations to a saved list by id or slug (free). Required: list_id. Optional: organization_ids, organization_slugs. Returns the new ListAddResult.

tools.name: organization-lists_create
tools.description: Create a new organization list (free). Required: name. Returns the new OrganizationListSummary.

tools.name: organization-lists_get
tools.description: Get the organizations in a saved list (1 credit per organization returned). Required: list_id. Returns array of Organization.

tools.name: organization-lists_list
tools.description: List your saved organization lists (1 credit per list returned). Returns array of OrganizationListSummary.

tools.name: organizations_enrich
tools.description: Enrich one organization's technology stack with job/people/team signals (5 credits per technology found). Required: organization. Optional: filters. Returns array of EnrichedTechnology.

params.name: organization
params.description: The organization to enrich — supply exactly one identifier

params.name: filters
params.description: Optional technology filters to scope the enrichment

tools.name: organizations_find
tools.description: Find organizations matching technology/category/firmographic filters (5 credits per row returned). Required: filters. Optional: order_by_column, order_by_direction, include_entity_details (plus 2 more). Returns array of Organization.

params.name: filters
params.description: Match criteria — set technologies/categories/since for structured matching, or a natural-language query

params.name: include_entity_details
params.description: Include matching tags/entities per row (raises per-row cost)

tools.name: organizations_intelligence-brief
tools.description: AI-generated intelligence brief for an organization (50 credits when complete; 202 while pending is free). Required: organization_id. Returns the IntelligenceBrief.

tools.name: organizations_match
tools.description: Resolve up to 1000 company names/URLs/locations to Sumble organizations (1 credit per matched org; unmatched free). Required: organizations. Returns array of MatchResult.

tools.name: people_enrich
tools.description: Reveal a person's email (10 credits) and/or phone (80 credits); cached or unavailable reveals are free. Required: person_id. Optional: include_email, include_phone. Returns the new ContactInfo.

params.name: include_email
params.description: Reveal email addresses (10 credits on first reveal)

params.name: include_phone
params.description: Reveal phone number (80 credits on first reveal)

tools.name: people_find
tools.description: Find people at an organization by job function/level/country (1 credit per person). Required: organization, filters. Optional: limit, offset. Returns array of Person.

params.name: organization
params.description: The organization to search within — supply exactly one identifier

params.name: filters
params.description: Persona criteria — structured facets or a natural-language query

tools.name: people_find-related-people
tools.description: Find people above/below a person in the org chart (1 credit per person). Required: person_id. Optional: limit, offset. Returns array of RelatedPerson.

params.name: person_id
params.description: Sumble person id to traverse from

tools.name: postings_find
tools.description: Find job postings by technology/category/country (2 credits per job, 3 with descriptions). Required: filters. Optional: organization, include_descriptions, limit (plus 1 more). Returns array of Job.

params.name: organization
params.description: Optional organization to scope the search — supply one identifier

params.name: filters
params.description: Job match criteria — structured facets or a natural-language query

params.name: include_descriptions
params.description: Include full job descriptions (raises per-job cost to 3 credits)

tools.name: postings_find-related-people
tools.description: Find people associated with a job posting (1 credit per person). Required: job_id. Optional: limit, offset. Returns array of Person.

tools.name: postings_get
tools.description: Get a single job posting with its full description (1 credit). Required: job_id. Returns the JobDetail.

tools.name: technologies_find
tools.description: Search technologies by name; returns canonical slugs (1 credit only if at least one match, else free). Required: query.

params.name: query
params.description: Technology name to search for (e.g. kafka)
